notes: First run. Serena LSP tools (find_symbol, get_symbols_overview, search_for_pattern) returned EOF errors - fell back to direct grep/read analysis. Key findings: missing context in HTTP/subprocess calls, interface design issues, error propagation gaps. 767 non-test Go files analyzed in pkg/.

Run 2. Serena LSP fully operational. 50% cached: deepened error-handling analysis from run 1, confirmed verbose-only error silencing in audit.go (14+ instances). 50% new: symbol naming + API consistency analysis. Key findings: (1) verbose-only error silencing in AuditWorkflowRun, (2) redundant AnomalyReport fields IsNewTemplate/NewClusterCreated always set identically - confirmed via find_referencing_symbols, (3) inconsistent constructor signatures in agentdrain (NewAnomalyDetector lacks error return unlike all others). LSP confirmed finding #2 definitively.
